title: Fix grazing bugs + resize canvas + move fountain

log.context: Fix grazing bugs + resize canvas + move fountain

All 5 fixes applied and pushed (commit `ce6da92`):

**Fix 1 — Block WASD when modal open:** Added an early-return check at the top of the `keydown` handler that bails if `#congress-modal-overlay` is visible.

**Fix 2 — Clear keys on blur:** Added a `window.addEventListener('blur', ...)` handler that sets all `keysDown` values to false, preventing stuck movement when tabbing away.

**Fix 3 — Ghost avatar:** Added `if (p.name === localPlayer.name) continue;` inside `drawRemotePlayers` loop as an a...(truncated)
